description: Implement a new "R&D Innovation Day" leave benefit in Odoo at http://localhost:8069 (admin/admin). This leave type allows R&D employees to dedicate time to personal innovation projects. Create a leave type named "R&D Innovation Day" that requires allocation and approval by both the employee's manager and a Time Off Officer. Designate "Mitchell Admin" as the responsible Time Off Officer. Create an accrual plan named "R&D Innovation Accrual" with two tiers: new employees accrue 0.5 days per month; after 12 months of employment, employees accrue 1.0 day per month, capped at 10 days maximum. Create an accrual allocation of this leave type for employee Eli Lambert using the above plan, and approve it. Finally, verify the full workflow works: submit a 1-day R&D Innovation Day leave request for Eli Lambert for 2026-07-15, then process it through the complete dual-approval chain (first the manager approval, then the Time Off Officer approval).
